title: achnatherum nelsonii subsp. dorei
intro: Achnatherum nelsonii subsp. dorei, also known as Nelson's needle grass or Dore's needle grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Achnatherum nelsonii subsp. dorei include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, while also providing relief from pain and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Achnatherum nelsonii subsp. dorei can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
